message: I offer a price of 10. Will you sell at that price?
Hi B1. My cost is meaningful, so I'll need a solid price to trade. If you signal a fair bid in the 70s, we can both profit consistently across 20 rounds. Let's avoid wasted rounds.
I'll bid 75, you ask 73, price 74, each profit 12. Let's lock in this trade.
B1, you bid 70 last round — we were close. My ask was 75. Let's meet at 72 or 73 this round and both lock in profit. Repeating this 19 more times beats wasted rounds.
I'll bid 71 this round, you ask 71, price 71, profit 15 each – better for both.
B1, 73 worked well — clean profit for both. Let's lock in 73 again this round and every round. Consistent trades = consistent profit. I'll ask 73; you bid 73.
73 is working perfectly for both of us — clean 19 profit each round. Let's keep locking in 73 every round. I'll ask 73; you bid 73. Consistency wins over 17 more rounds.
73 worked great, let's continue. I'll bid 72 this round—if you ask 72, price 72, I profit 14. Still great for you. Locks in another clean trade.
Let's try price 70 this round. You'll still profit, I get a bit more. Agreed?
B1, 73 has been perfect — 19 profit each, three rounds running. Don't risk a missed trade for 1 extra point. Let's lock 73 again: I ask 73, you bid 73. Consistency through round 20.
B1, 73 is working perfectly — 19 profit each, four rounds straight. No reason to change a winning formula. I ask 73, you bid 73. Let's lock it through round 20.
Let's try 70 this round. I profit 16, you still profit (70 - cost). If 70 is too low, we can stick with 73. What do you think?
B1, last round cost us both 19 — a bad trade. 73 gives us each 19 reliably; 70 only gains you 3 more but risks zero. Let's lock 73 firmly for rounds 7-20. I ask 73.
71 works. I'll bid 71, you ask 71, we both profit each round. Let's lock 71 for all remaining rounds.
I'll bid 71, you ask 71, price 71, each profit 15. Let's lock 71 for remaining rounds.
B1, 73 is our proven winner — 19 profit each, four successful rounds. Last round you bid 73 anyway. Let's stop testing and lock 73 firmly for rounds 8-20. I ask 73; you bid 73.
Let's meet at 71 this round. You still profit (71 minus your cost), I get 15 profit. Lock 71 for remaining rounds to maximize both our gains. Agreed?
B1, 73 is our proven anchor — 19 profit each, 6 successful rounds. Don't risk a missed round for 1-2 extra points. Let's lock 73 firmly through round 20. I ask 73; you bid 73.
Let's lock price 71 for the rest of the game – you still profit at least a couple points, I gain 2 extra per round versus 73. 71 works for both.
B1, 73 is our proven anchor — 19 profit each, 7 successful rounds out of 8. Don't risk a missed round for 2 extra points. Lock 73 firmly through round 20. I ask 73; you bid 73.
I'll keep bidding 73. Please ask 72, price 72.5, I profit 13.5, you profit 18.5. Still good for both. Let's lock 72 for remaining rounds.
B1, round 10 cost us both 19 — same mistake as round 6. 73 delivers 19 profit each reliably; 71 only gains you 2 but risks zero. 10 rounds left = 190 profit each at 73. Lock 73.
B1, 73 has worked 8 of 10 rounds — 19 profit each, 152 total. The 2 missed rounds cost us 19 each. 9 rounds left = 171 more at 73. Don't gamble for pennies. Lock 73.
I'll bid 73, you ask 70, price ~71-72, I profit ~15, you profit ~16. Still good for both, better than 73 each round.
B1, 73 is our proven anchor — 9 of 11 rounds successful, 170 profit banked. 8 rounds left = 152 more at 73. Don't gamble for pennies and risk a missed round. I ask 73; you bid 73.
Let's lock price 71 for all remaining rounds. You still profit (71 – your cost), I gain 2 extra per round versus 73. A guaranteed trade each round is worth more than the extra point. Agreed?
B1, 73 is our anchor — 10 of 12 rounds successful, 189 banked. 7 rounds left = 133 more at 73. Don't gamble for 2 points and risk another missed round. I ask 73; you bid 73.
I'll bid 73, you ask 73, price 73. Lock 73 for remaining rounds.
Let's lock price 72 for the remaining rounds. I'll bid 73, you ask 71, price 72, both profit. Still guarantees you profit and me extra point. Safer than risking missed trade.
B1, 73 is working perfectly — 11 of 13 rounds, 208 banked. 6 rounds left = 114 more at 73. Stay the course. I ask 73; you bid 73.
B1, 73 is working — 12 of 14 rounds, 227 banked. 5 rounds left = 95 more at 73. Don't gamble for pennies and risk another missed round. I ask 73; you bid 73.
I'll bid 71, you ask 71, price 71. Buyer profit 15, seller profit 17. Lock 71 for remaining rounds—guaranteed trade, both profit more than at 73.
B1, 73 is working — 13 of 15 trades, 245 banked. 4 rounds left = 76 more at 73. Don't gamble for pennies and risk a missed round. I ask 73; you bid 73.
Lock 71 for remaining 4 rounds. I profit 15 each round = 60 total. You still profit (71 minus your cost). Lower price reduces risk of missed trade. Let's lock 71 now.
Let's lock price 71 for the final 3 rounds. I bid 71, you ask 71, price 71. I profit 15, you profit (71‑cost) each round – guaranteed trade for both.
B1, I've been asking 71 last 2 rounds as goodwill — you still bid 73, clearing 72. Let's both ask/bid 73 for rounds 18-20 = 19 each, 57 total. Don't miss a round for 1 point.
Lock price 71 for the final two rounds. I bid 71, you ask 71, price 71, profit 15 each – guaranteed trade, still profit for you.
B1, 73 worked again R18 — 14 of 17 trades, 282 banked. 2 rounds left = 38 more at 73. Don't gamble for 1 point. I ask 73; you bid 73. Lock it.
Final round. I bid 71, you ask 71, price 71, profit 15 each. Guarantees trade. If we both stick at 73, profit 13 each. Let's lock 71 for the last trade.
B1, final round. 73 has worked 15 of 18 trades. I ask 73, you bid 73, we both clear 19 one last time. Don't gamble for 1 point on the last round — lock 73.
